You are working on `GH-Mantova/ProjectOperations`. Read `CLAUDE.md` and follow it.

## Background

Today on the Scope of Works tab, clicking "+ Add card" creates a new discipline card immediately with a default discipline (usually `OTHER` or the first option). The user then has to click into the right-side dropdown to change the discipline.

Owner wants discipline selection to happen **upfront** at card creation, so estimators can't accidentally leave a card with the wrong discipline. Implementation:

- "+ Add card" opens a small modal/popup
- Modal shows a **required** discipline picker: **Demolition (DEM)**, **Civil Works (CIV)**, **Asbestos Removal (ASB)**, **Other (OTHER)**
- One choice per card (radio buttons OR a dropdown ŌĆö owner OK with either; pick what fits existing modal patterns)
- No default ŌĆö user must pick before the Create button enables
- Cancel button closes the modal without creating anything
- Create button creates the card with the chosen discipline AND any default card name (e.g. "Demolition" ŌåÆ existing card name conventions). User can rename the card freely after creation; discipline can be changed later via the existing right-side menu on the card.

## Phase 0

- `git fetch origin`; branch off `main`: `feat/card-creation-discipline-picker`.

## Implementation

1. **Find the "+ Add card" entry point** ŌĆö likely in `apps/web/src/pages/tendering/scope-cards/ScopeCardsTab.tsx` or wherever the new-card button is wired. Today it probably calls a `createCard()` handler that immediately POSTs to `/api/v1/tenders/:tenderId/scope/cards` with a default discipline.

2. **Replace the immediate-create with a modal flow.** Create a new component `apps/web/src/pages/tendering/scope-cards/NewCardModal.tsx`:
   - Modal shell matching existing app modal conventions (look at `ConfirmDeleteDialog`, `AddClientModal`, `ConvertToProjectModal` for the pattern ŌĆö title, body, footer with Cancel + primary action).
   - Title: **"Add scope card"**.
   - Body: discipline picker. Use radio buttons stacked vertically OR a dropdown ŌĆö choose whichever fits the app's modal pattern. Options (label + value):
     - Demolition (DEM)
     - Civil Works (CIV)
     - Asbestos Removal (ASB)
     - Other (OTHER)
   - Primary action: **"Create card"** ŌĆö disabled until a discipline is picked. On click, fires the POST with the chosen `discipline` and a default `name` derived from the discipline label.
   - Cancel closes the modal without action.

3. **Wire the "+ Add card" button to open this modal** instead of immediately creating.

4. **Default card name on creation:** use the discipline's human label (e.g. "Demolition", "Civil works", "Asbestos removal", "Other"). The owner can rename later via the existing card-header rename affordance.

5. **No API change needed** ŌĆö the existing `POST /scope/cards` endpoint already accepts a `discipline` field. Just ensure the picker's chosen value is sent.

## Tests

- Component test: NewCardModal renders four discipline options; Create button is disabled until one is selected.
- Component test: clicking Create calls the onConfirm handler with the chosen discipline; clicking Cancel calls onClose without firing onConfirm.
- Integration test: clicking "+ Add card" on the Scope of Works tab opens the modal; submitting the modal creates a new card with the chosen discipline; the card appears in the list.
- ┬¦6 pre-PR CI checklist green.

- Body: describe the new modal flow; note that the existing right-side discipline-change menu on each card is preserved (no removal); the only behaviour change is at create time.
- Reviewer `GH-Mantova`.
- **Do NOT auto-merge.** Owner verifies: clicking + Add card opens the modal, Create stays disabled with nothing selected, picking a discipline + Create produces a card with that discipline.

## Scope

Only the create-card flow. Do not touch the post-create rename behaviour, do not touch the discipline-change menu on existing cards.
